title: Clone Krayin Laravel CRM repository
description: Clone https://github.com/krayin/laravel-crm (branch 2.1) into the project workspace. This is the foundation for all subsequent work.

title: Set up Docker Compose for local development
description: Create docker-compose.yml with PHP 8.1+ (Laravel), MySQL 8.0, Redis, Nginx, and Mailpit (for email testing). Ensure the Krayin installer runs on first boot. Include volume mounts for hot-reload development. Reference docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for stack details.

title: Verify base Krayin CRM runs in Docker
description: Run docker compose up, complete the web installer, verify login works, dashboard loads, and all existing modules (leads, contacts, activities, pipelines, email, quotes, products, warehouses, web forms) function correctly.

title: Set up Playwright E2E test framework
description: Install Playwright, configure it to run against the Docker-hosted CRM. Create base test utilities: login helper, navigation helpers, API helpers for seeding test data. Create a smoke test that logs in and verifies dashboard loads.

title: Write baseline Playwright smoke tests for existing features
description: Write E2E tests verifying all existing Krayin functionality works: create/edit/delete contact, create/edit/delete lead, Kanban board drag-drop, create activity, send email, create quote, create product, web form submission, tag management, user/role management. These serve as regression tests.

title: Create docs directory structure
description: Create docs/ folder with ARCHITECTURE.md, MOBILE_APP_PLAN.md, BROWSER_EXTENSION_PLAN.md, and any other planning docs. Keep all markdown documentation out of the repo root.

title: Design white-label database schema
description: Create migration for white_label_settings table: app_name, logo_url, logo_dark_url, favicon_url, primary_color, secondary_color, accent_color, email_sender_name, support_url, login_bg_image, custom_css. Seed with default values.

title: Build WhiteLabel Laravel package
description: Create packages/Webkul/WhiteLabel/ following Krayin's package pattern (Provider, Config, Models, Repositories, Routes). Build admin settings page for uploading logo, favicon, and configuring colors/app name.

title: Implement CSS custom properties theming system
description: Replace hardcoded brand colors throughout Krayin's Vue.js frontend with CSS custom properties (--primary-color, --secondary-color, etc.) driven by white_label_settings database values. Update login page, sidebar, header, buttons.

title: Make email templates brandable
description: Update all email templates (workflow emails, notification emails) to use white-label settings: app name, logo, colors. Create a base email layout that reads from white_label_settings.

title: Write Playwright tests for white-label features
description: Test: change app name and verify it appears in header/title. Upload custom logo and verify it renders. Change primary color and verify CSS updates. Verify login page shows custom branding.

title: Design and document public REST API
description: Create OpenAPI/Swagger spec for all public API endpoints: auth, contacts, leads, deals, pipelines, activities, tags, users, emails, action-stream, notifications. Use Laravel Sanctum for token auth. Reference docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for endpoint design.

title: Build PublicApi Laravel package — authentication
description: Create packages/Webkul/PublicApi/. Implement token-based auth with Laravel Sanctum: login, logout, token refresh, token scoping. Rate limiting middleware.

title: Build PublicApi — contacts endpoints
description: CRUD endpoints for persons and organizations: list (paginated, filterable, searchable), get, create, update, delete. Include custom attributes, tags, and related entities.

title: Build PublicApi — leads/deals endpoints
description: CRUD endpoints for leads: list (paginated, filterable), get, create, update, delete, stage transitions. Include pipeline association, products, quotes linkage.

title: Build PublicApi — activities endpoints
description: CRUD endpoints for activities: list, get, create, update, delete. Filter by type (call, meeting, task, note). Include participants and file attachments.

title: Build PublicApi — pipelines and tags endpoints
description: Read endpoints for pipelines/stages and full CRUD for tags. Needed by mobile app and browser extension.

title: Build PublicApi — email endpoints
description: Endpoints for email: list inbox/sent/drafts, get thread, send, reply, forward. Needed by mobile app.

title: Write Playwright API tests for all public endpoints
description: Comprehensive API tests using Playwright's request context: test every endpoint for success, validation errors, auth failures, pagination, filtering. Test rate limiting.

title: Set up Laravel WebSockets / Soketi
description: Install and configure WebSocket server (Soketi or laravel-websockets). Add to Docker Compose. Configure Laravel broadcasting with Pusher driver pointing to local WebSocket server.

title: Implement WebSocket channels and events
description: Create broadcast events for: notification received, contact updated, lead stage changed, email received, action stream updated. Create private channels per user and presence channels per team.

title: Add Vue.js WebSocket client
description: Integrate Laravel Echo into the Vue.js frontend. Listen for real-time events and update UI reactively (notifications badge, action stream refresh, contact updates).

title: Design Next Action data model
description: Create migration for next_actions table: id, actionable_type (person/lead), actionable_id, user_id, action_type (call/email/meeting/task/custom), description, due_date, due_time, priority (urgent/high/normal/low), status (pending/completed/snoozed), completed_at, snoozed_until. Add indexes for efficient querying.

title: Build ActionStream Laravel package — models and repositories
description: Create packages/Webkul/ActionStream/ with NextAction model, repository, and service layer. Business logic: creating next actions, completing them (auto-suggest next), snoozing, priority sorting, overdue detection.

title: Build Action Stream API endpoints
description: Add action-stream endpoints to PublicApi: GET /action-stream (prioritized list), POST /action-stream (create), PUT /action-stream/{id} (update/complete/snooze), DELETE /action-stream/{id}. Include filtering by user, date range, priority.

title: Build Action Stream Vue.js UI — main view
description: Create the Action Stream page as a new top-level navigation item. Show prioritized list of next actions with: contact name, action type icon, description, due date, priority color coding. Sortable by due date, priority. Filterable by type, assignee.

title: Implement color-coded priority system
description: Visual urgency indicators: red (overdue), orange (due today), yellow (due this week), green (upcoming), gray (no due date). Apply to Action Stream items, contact views, and deal views.

title: Add Next Action widget to contact detail view
description: On the person/lead detail page, show the current Next Action prominently at top. Allow completing it and immediately setting a new one. Show action history timeline.

title: Build Team Stream view
description: New page showing all team members' actions in a unified feed. Filter by user, action type, date. Show who completed what and when. Real-time updates via WebSocket.

title: Auto-prompt for next action on lead stage change
description: When a lead moves to a new pipeline stage, prompt the user to set the next action. When a next action is completed, prompt for the follow-up action. Make the CRM action-first.

title: Write Playwright tests for Action Stream
description: Test: create next action from contact page, verify it appears in Action Stream. Complete an action and verify prompt for next. Test priority color coding. Test Team Stream. Test snooze. Test overdue detection. Test filtering and sorting.

title: Design notification and comments schema
description: Create migrations: notifications table (id, user_id, type, title, body, data JSON, read_at, created_at) and comments table (id, commentable_type, commentable_id, user_id, body, mentioned_user_ids JSON, created_at).

title: Build Notification Laravel package
description: Create packages/Webkul/Notification/ with models, repositories, notification service. Support creating notifications from: comments, @mentions, lead stage changes, deal assignments, action stream reminders, email receipts.

title: Build notification UI — bell icon and dropdown
description: Add notification bell to the top nav bar with unread count badge. Dropdown shows recent notifications. Click to navigate to relevant record. Mark as read on click or bulk mark all read. Real-time updates via WebSocket.

title: Build comments and @mentions system
description: Add comment section to contact, lead, and deal detail pages. Support @mentioning users with autocomplete. Creating a comment with @mention triggers a notification to the mentioned user.

title: Add notification API endpoints
description: GET /notifications (paginated), PUT /notifications/{id}/read, PUT /notifications/read-all, GET /notifications/unread-count. Needed by mobile app.

title: Write Playwright tests for notifications and comments
description: Test: @mention a user in a comment and verify notification appears. Test bell icon count. Test mark as read. Test notification navigation. Test comment CRUD on contacts and leads.

title: Implement soft delete with 30-day restore
description: Add SoftDeletes trait to Person, Organization, and Lead models. Create a 'Trash' view in admin showing soft-deleted records. Add restore button. Schedule artisan command to permanently delete records older than 30 days.

title: Add required custom fields admin toggle
description: In the custom attributes admin page, add a 'Required' toggle per attribute. Enforce required validation on entity creation/update forms when the attribute is marked required.

title: Build split view (list + detail panel)
description: Add a split-view mode to contacts and leads list pages. Left panel shows the filterable list; right panel shows the selected record's detail view. Toggle between full-page and split-view modes.

title: Write Playwright tests for contact UX improvements
description: Test: delete contact and verify it appears in trash. Restore from trash. Verify auto-purge after 30 days (mock time). Test required custom field enforcement. Test split view toggle and navigation.

title: Design email account and tracking schema
description: Create migrations: email_accounts (id, user_id, email_address, imap_host, imap_port, imap_encryption, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_encryption, username, password_encrypted, last_sync_at, status), email_tracking_events (id, email_id, event_type [open/click], ip_address, user_agent, url_clicked, created_at), scheduled_emails (id, email_id, scheduled_at, sent_at, status).

title: Build two-way IMAP/SMTP email sync service
description: Create EmailSync package. Implement IMAP connection manager that polls for new emails. Match incoming emails to CRM contacts by email address. Sync sent emails. Store synced emails in existing Krayin email tables. Run sync as a scheduled Laravel job (every 2-5 minutes).

title: Build email account configuration UI
description: Admin page where users can add their email accounts (Gmail IMAP/SMTP, Outlook IMAP/SMTP, custom). OAuth2 flow for Gmail and Outlook. Test connection button. Sync status indicator.

title: Implement smart email filtering
description: When syncing emails via IMAP, only import emails where the sender/recipient matches a CRM contact's email address. Filter out newsletters, automated emails, and non-contact correspondence. Allow user to configure filter rules.

title: Build shared team inbox
description: Create a shared inbox view that aggregates emails across team members' connected accounts. Show which team member owns each email thread. Allow reassignment. Filter by assigned user.

title: Build bulk email sending
description: Allow selecting multiple contacts from a list view and sending a personalized email using a template. Support merge fields (contact name, company, etc.). Rate limit sends (configurable, default 450/day). Queue via Laravel jobs. Show send progress.

title: Build email scheduling
description: When composing an email, allow the user to choose 'Send Later' with a date/time picker. Store in scheduled_emails table. Laravel scheduler sends at the specified time. Show scheduled emails in a 'Scheduled' folder.

title: Build email open and click tracking
description: When sending emails, inject a 1x1 tracking pixel and wrap links. Track open events (pixel loaded) and click events (link clicked). Show tracking data on the email detail view: opened at, opened count, links clicked. Real-time notification when an email is opened.

title: Build email history fetching
description: For newly connected email accounts, allow importing historical emails (last 30/60/90 days configurable). Background job fetches and processes historical IMAP emails, matching to CRM contacts.

title: Build email sequence / drip campaign engine
description: Create a sequence builder: define a series of emails with delays between them (e.g., Day 1: intro, Day 3: follow-up, Day 7: check-in). Enroll contacts in sequences. Auto-stop if contact replies. Track sequence performance.

title: Write Playwright tests for email features
description: Test: connect IMAP account (use Mailpit in Docker for testing). Verify email sync pulls emails. Send email and verify it appears in sent. Test smart filtering. Test bulk email with template. Test email scheduling. Test open tracking pixel. Test email sequence enrollment.

title: Build delivery pipeline type
description: Add a pipeline_type column to pipelines table (sales/delivery). When a lead is marked 'Won', offer to move it to a delivery pipeline. Delivery pipelines have their own stages (e.g., Onboarding, In Progress, Completed). Show delivery pipelines in a separate tab.

title: Build deal velocity analytics
description: Track timestamps when leads enter and exit each pipeline stage. Calculate average time per stage. Show velocity metrics on pipeline view: avg days per stage, bottleneck identification, comparison over time periods.

title: Build revenue forecasting
description: Calculate expected revenue per pipeline: sum of (deal value * stage probability) for all active deals. Show forecast on dashboard and pipeline view. Break down by time period (this month, quarter, year). Compare forecast vs actual (won deals).

title: Write Playwright tests for pipeline features
description: Test: create delivery pipeline, move won deal to it, verify stages work. Test deal velocity calculations. Test revenue forecast accuracy against known deal data.

title: Build custom report builder — backend
description: Create ReportBuilder package. Data model: report_definitions (name, entity_type, columns, filters, grouping, sorting, chart_type). Support entity types: leads, contacts, activities, emails, deals. Generate SQL queries dynamically from report definitions.

title: Build custom report builder — frontend UI
description: Vue.js report builder interface: select entity type, choose columns, add filters (date range, user, status, tags), choose grouping, select chart type (bar, line, pie, table). Preview report. Save report with a name.

title: Build report save and schedule system
description: Save report definitions to database. Schedule reports to run and email results (daily, weekly, monthly). Choose recipients and format (PDF, CSV, XLS). Laravel scheduler triggers report generation and email delivery.

title: Add dashboard segmentation by user/team
description: Enhance existing dashboard to add user/team filter dropdown. When a user or team is selected, all dashboard charts filter to show only that user's/team's data. Add date range selector.

title: Build activity reports
description: Dedicated activity reporting: calls made, meetings held, emails sent, tasks completed per user per time period. Comparison charts between team members. Leaderboard view.

title: Write Playwright tests for reporting
description: Test: create custom report, verify data accuracy. Save report, reload and verify it persists. Schedule report, verify email delivery (via Mailpit). Test dashboard filters. Test activity report data.

title: Build pre-saved action sequences (playbooks)
description: Create a 'Playbooks' feature in the automation module. A playbook is a reusable sequence of actions (e.g., create activity, send email, update field, wait X days) that can be triggered on any contact or lead. Playbook builder UI with drag-and-drop steps.

title: Build contact enrichment service
description: Integrate with a data enrichment API (Clearbit, Hunter.io, or similar — make it configurable). One-click enrichment button on contact detail page. Auto-fill company info, social profiles, job title from email address. Also available as a workflow action.

title: Write Playwright tests for automation enhancements
description: Test: create a playbook with multiple steps, trigger it on a contact, verify each step executes. Test contact enrichment (mock external API). Test playbook editing and deletion.

title: Build Zapier integration app
description: Use Zapier CLI to create a Zapier app. Triggers: new contact, new lead, lead stage changed, deal won, deal lost, new activity, email received. Actions: create contact, create lead, update lead stage, create activity, send email. Authentication via API tokens.

title: Build Make.com integration module
description: Create HTTP module definitions for Make.com. Support same triggers and actions as Zapier. Webhook-based triggers using Krayin's existing webhook system.

title: Build Google Calendar sync
description: OAuth2 flow for Google Calendar. Two-way sync: CRM activities (meetings, calls) sync to Google Calendar and vice versa. Show Google Calendar events in CRM activity timeline. Handle conflict resolution.

title: Build Outlook Calendar sync
description: OAuth2 flow for Microsoft Graph API. Two-way sync of CRM activities with Outlook Calendar. Same feature set as Google Calendar sync.

title: Build QuickBooks integration
description: OAuth2 connection to QuickBooks Online. Create invoices from CRM quotes/deals. View QuickBooks invoice status in CRM. Sync customer data between CRM contacts and QuickBooks customers.

title: Build Xero integration
description: OAuth2 connection to Xero. Create invoices from CRM quotes/deals. View Xero invoice status in CRM. Sync contacts between CRM and Xero.

title: Build Mailchimp integration
description: Connect to Mailchimp API. Sync CRM contacts to Mailchimp audiences. Segment by tags. View Mailchimp campaign stats (opens, clicks) on CRM contact records. Subscribe/unsubscribe from CRM.

title: Write Playwright tests for integrations
description: Test Zapier webhook triggers fire correctly. Test calendar sync creates events (mock Google/Outlook APIs). Test QuickBooks invoice creation (mock). Test Mailchimp contact sync (mock).

title: Build Click-to-Call with VoIP integration
description: Integrate with Twilio or similar VoIP provider (make it configurable). Click-to-call button on contact records. Auto-log call as activity. Call recording storage (optional). Show call duration.

title: Build speed dial feature
description: Quick-dial sidebar or widget showing recently contacted or favorited contacts with one-click call buttons. Uses the Click-to-Call VoIP integration.

title: Write Playwright tests for telephony
description: Test: click-to-call button triggers call (mock VoIP). Verify activity is auto-logged. Test speed dial panel. Test call recording playback.

title: Build GDPR compliance tools
description: Add consent tracking fields to contacts. Data export button (download all data for a contact as JSON/CSV). Right to deletion workflow (anonymize/delete all contact data and related records). Cookie consent banner for web forms. Data processing agreement template.

title: Build automated backup system
description: Create artisan command for full database backup (mysqldump). Configure in Laravel scheduler (daily). Store backups locally and optionally to S3. Retention policy (keep last 30 days). Admin page showing backup history with download/restore buttons.

title: Write Playwright tests for security features
description: Test: GDPR data export generates correct file. Test data deletion removes all related records. Test backup creation and listing.

title: Initialize React Native (Expo) project
description: Create mobile/ directory with Expo project. Set up navigation (React Navigation), state management (Zustand), API client (Axios with Sanctum token auth), and base UI components matching CRM branding. Reference docs/MOBILE_APP_PLAN.md.

title: Build mobile authentication screens
description: Login screen with email/password. Biometric unlock (Face ID / fingerprint). Token storage in secure storage. Auto-refresh token. Logout. Server URL configuration (for self-hosted instances).

title: Build mobile contacts screen
description: Contacts list with search, pull-to-refresh, infinite scroll. Contact detail view showing all info, activities, deals, next action. Create/edit contact form. Tap to call/email.

title: Build mobile deals/pipeline screen
description: Pipeline selector, horizontal-scrolling Kanban board with drag-and-drop. Deal detail view. Create/edit deal. Stage transitions via drag or button.

title: Build mobile Action Stream screen
description: Prioritized list of next actions with color coding. Swipe right to complete (prompts for next action). Swipe left to snooze. Pull-to-refresh. Filter by type.

title: Build mobile activity logging
description: Create activity screen: select type (call, meeting, note, task), link to contact/deal, add description, set date/time. Activity timeline on contact/deal detail. Quick-log call after phone call.

title: Build mobile email screen
description: Inbox view showing synced emails. Compose new email. Reply/forward. Email templates. Basic email tracking status display.

title: Build mobile notifications
description: Push notification setup via Expo Push Notifications (FCM/APNs). Notification center screen showing all notifications. Tap to navigate. Badge count on app icon.

title: Implement offline mode and real-time sync
description: Cache contacts, deals, and action stream in local storage for offline viewing. Queue create/update operations when offline. Sync when connection resumes. Real-time updates via WebSocket when online.

title: Build AI Route Planner
description: Map view showing contact locations (geocoded addresses). Route optimization between selected contacts using Google Maps Directions API. Turn-by-turn navigation via deep link to Google Maps/Apple Maps. Save planned routes.

title: Build AI Business Card Scanner
description: Camera screen for capturing business cards. OCR processing (Google Cloud Vision or Tesseract). Parse extracted text into contact fields (name, company, email, phone, address). Pre-filled contact creation form. Save scanned card image as attachment.

title: Write mobile E2E tests (Detox or Maestro)
description: E2E tests for critical mobile flows: login, view contacts, create contact, view action stream, complete action, view pipeline, create deal, send email, receive notification. Run against a test API server.

title: Initialize Chrome extension project (Manifest V3)
description: Create extension/ directory with Manifest V3 structure. Set up popup (Vue.js mini-app), content scripts, service worker. Build system with Vite. Reference docs/BROWSER_EXTENSION_PLAN.md.

title: Build extension authentication
description: Login popup where user enters CRM instance URL and credentials. Store API token in Chrome storage. Auto-reconnect on extension open. Logout functionality.

title: Build generic web page contact scraper
description: Content script that scans the current page for: email addresses (mailto: and text patterns), phone numbers, names (from page title, headings), social links, addresses. Return structured data to popup.

title: Build LinkedIn profile parser
description: Dedicated content script for LinkedIn profile pages. Extract: name, headline/title, company, location, profile URL, profile photo URL. Handle LinkedIn's dynamic rendering.

title: Build capture popup UI
description: Extension popup showing pre-filled contact form from scraped data. Edit fields before saving. Add tags, assign to pipeline, set Next Action. Save button creates contact via Public API.

title: Write tests for browser extension
description: Jest unit tests for parsers (LinkedIn, generic scraper). Integration tests with mock Chrome APIs. Manual testing guide for loading unpacked extension.

title: Redesign navigation for action-first workflow
description: Restructure the main navigation to put Action Stream as the default landing page (not dashboard). Reorder sidebar: Action Stream > Contacts > Deals > Activities > Email > Reports > Settings. Simplify UI by removing visual clutter.

title: Add focused user role
description: Create a 'Focused User' role template in the roles system. Focused users can only see their own contacts, deals, activities, and action stream. They cannot access team stream, reports, or admin settings.

title: Write Playwright tests for UX polish
description: Test: verify Action Stream is default landing page. Test focused user role restrictions (cannot see other users' data). Test simplified navigation.

title: Full regression E2E test suite run
description: Run all Playwright tests end-to-end against a clean Docker environment. Fix any failures. Verify all features work together: Action Stream + Notifications + Email + Pipeline + Reporting.

title: Performance testing and optimization
description: Load test the CRM with 10k+ contacts, 5k+ leads, 50k+ emails. Identify and fix N+1 queries, slow pages, memory leaks. Optimize database indexes. Test WebSocket under concurrent connections.

title: Security audit
description: Review all new code for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities. Check SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, authentication bypass. Audit API token handling. Review email credential encryption. Verify RBAC enforcement on all new endpoints.

title: Documentation and deployment guide
description: Write deployment guide: Docker production setup, environment variables, email account configuration, Zapier setup, mobile app build/deploy, Chrome extension publish. Update README with feature list and screenshots.
